Title: Perfect Delivery Match (Zero Variance)
Scenario: The invoiced quantity and amount exactly match the actual delivery data from the ad server.
Input Data Source: Invoice amount, Ad Server delivery stats, IO Rate
Expected Agent Action: Agent calculates Expected Amount = (Ad Server Qty * IO Rate). It compares Expected vs Invoiced Amount and finds they are identical.

Title: Under-delivery (Overbilling Variance)
Scenario: The Publisher/Media Partner invoiced for a specific amount, but the ad server data shows fewer ads were actually delivered. The calculated Expected Amount is LESS than the Billed Amount.
Input Data Source: Invoice amount, Ad Server delivery stats, IO Rate
Expected Agent Action: Agent calculates Expected Amount based on actual ad server delivery. Logs that Billed Amount > Expected Amount.
Recommended Action (Fix): Request Credit Note for the undelivered portion

Title: Over-delivery (Underbilling Variance)
Scenario: The ad server data shows that more ads were delivered than what the Publisher/Media Partner invoiced for. The calculated Expected Amount is GREATER than the Billed Amount.
Input Data Source: Invoice amount, Ad Server delivery stats, IO Rate
Expected Agent Action: Agent calculates Expected Amount based on ad server delivery. Logs that Billed Amount < Expected Amount.
Recommended Action (Fix): Add Adjustment / Notify accounting (check if IO allows over-delivery billing)

Title: Zero Delivery with Full Invoice
Scenario: The Publisher/Media Partner submits a full invoice, but the ad server reports 0 impressions/deliveries for that period. Expected Amount is 0.
Input Data Source: Invoice amount, Ad Server delivery stats, IO Rate
Expected Agent Action: Agent calculates Expected Amount as 0. Compares to Billed Amount and flags the huge discrepancy.
Output (Exception Report Details): Variance: [Full Invoiced Amount], Reason: Zero Ad Server Delivery recorded

Title: Missing Integration Data (Mapping Gap)
Scenario: An invoice is received, but the agent cannot match it to any delivery data in the ad server.
Input Data Source: Invoice amount, Ad Server delivery stats
Expected Agent Action: Agent attempts to pull ad server metrics but returns null/empty for that specific IO line item.
Output (Exception Report Details): Variance: N/A, Reason: Missing Ad Server Data

Title: Amendment Rate Mismatch with Delivery
Scenario: Delivery volume is correct, but the Expected Amount differs from Billed Amount because the Publisher/Media Partner used an outdated IO rate.
Input Data Source: Invoice rate, Ad Server delivery stats, Active IO Rate
Expected Agent Action: Agent calculates Expected Amount using the latest IO rate and flags difference against invoiced total.
Output (Exception Report Details): Variance: [Difference due to rate], Reason: Rate Mismatch
